description: Advanced CSS backgrounds: SVG data URI background images, background-size, background-position, background-repeat, background-origin, filter: blur()
visual_assertions: The SVG circle pattern box should show repeating small indigo circle patterns
The SVG dot pattern box should show a repeating small grey dot pattern
The background-size: cover box should show the SVG pattern scaled to cover the entire box
The background-size: contain box should show one instance of the SVG pattern fit inside the box without cropping
The background-position: center box should show the SVG image centered within the box
The background-position: top right box should show the SVG image anchored to the top-right corner
The repeat-x box should show the SVG tiled horizontally along one row
The repeat-y box should show the SVG tiled vertically along one column
The no-repeat box should show only a single instance of the SVG image
The blur(2px) element should appear slightly blurred compared to the non-filtered element
The blur(5px) element should appear more heavily blurred than the blur(2px) element
